name: Okta - System Log sign-ins (UEBA / Zero Trust)
description: Inbound connector: ingests Okta System Log authentication events into XORCISM.IDENTITYSIGNIN - the continuous-verification telemetry behind the /zero-trust Identity pillar and the UEBA session-risk. Normalizes user, time, IP, location, device, MFA, result. Modes: `file` (an exported System Log JSON array), `live` (Okta /api/v1/logs with an org URL + API token), or `demo` (a built-in sample). Read-only against Okta. Config: OKTA_URL + OKTA_TOKEN (or pass `org` / `token`). Idempotent by Okta event uuid.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path to an exported Okta System Log (a JSON array of log events). A demo sample is used if omitted and no token is set.

parameters.name: org
parameters.help: Okta org base URL, e.g. https://acme.okta.com (overrides OKTA_URL)

parameters.name: token
parameters.help: Okta API token (SSWS) (overrides OKTA_TOKEN) for live /api/v1/logs

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Max events to pull in live mode
